commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=52e337159bafcef444e4aa67021c4161f38d325e)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a DingTalk external channel entry to `scripts/lib/official-external-channel-catalog.json` so DingTalk can appear in configure/install-on-demand channel selection.

PR surface: Other +38. Total +38 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new catalog-discovery capability rather than fixing a reported existing bug. The review instead checks whether the new user-facing configure/install metadata is internally consistent.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers include official catalog promotion, ClawHub-vs-npm source policy, and compatibility metadata, which need maintainer judgment before an automated repair lane should change the branch.

target.title: feat(catalog): add DingTalk to official external channel catalog
target.body:
## Summary

- Add DingTalk (钉钉) as an external channel entry in `official-external-channel-catalog.json`, so it appears in the `openclaw configure` channel selection wizard with install-on-demand support.
- Follows the same pattern used by WeCom, Yuanbao, and Weixin — all third-party maintained external plugins.
- **No core code changes**: only a single JSON catalog entry addition.

## Context

The DingTalk OpenClaw connector ([`@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector)) is an external channel plugin maintained by the official DingTalk team. It supports:
- DingTalk enterprise bot via Stream mode
- AI Card streaming responses
- QR code onboarding setup wizard

As suggested in #81708 review comments, this plugin is published as an external npm package rather than bundled in `extensions/`. Adding it to the catalog enables seamless discovery via `openclaw configure` without any core code changes.

## ClawSweeper Review Fixes (v2)

All technical issues from the initial ClawSweeper review have been addressed:

| Issue | Before | After |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Floating npm version | `@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector` (bare) | `@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector@0.8.20` (pinned) |
| Missing integrity | Not present | `sha512-VyOouiNA4HHuO24P3gDNl5YIQmUbdkNw5sWH74IJo3gnfEdciw7pCufCqYeXojIvSj/iZxwk6Rl9dzT7AmHbiQ==` |
| docsLabel mismatch | `dingtalk-connector` | `dingtalk` (matches community docs anchor) |

The entry now follows the exact same `exact-with-integrity` policy as WeCom (`@wecom/wecom-openclaw-plugin@2026.5.7` + integrity) and other third-party external entries.

## Real Behavior Proof

- **npm registry**: `npm view @dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector@0.8.20 dist.integrity` returns the exact `sha512` hash used in this entry.
- **Plugin functionality**: The plugin is actively maintained at [DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-openclaw-connector](https://github.com/DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-openclaw-connector) with 2.1k+ stars, and the maintainer is also a core contributor to the DingTalk channel support in OpenClaw Hermes.
- **Catalog format**: Entry mirrors the existing WeCom, Yuanbao, and Weixin external entries — same `source: "external"`, same `docsPath` convention (`/plugins/community#dingtalk`), same schema shape.

## Verification

- [x] JSON validates successfully
- [x] Entry follows existing external plugin format (WeCom / Yuanbao / Weixin)
- [x] npmSpec pinned to exact version `@0.8.20`
- [x] `expectedIntegrity` hash matches npm registry dist integrity
- [x] `docsLabel` follows naming convention
- [x] Single file change: `scripts/lib/official-external-channel-catalog.json`
target.author: meng93

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: meng93
commands.command: thanks for the detailed review. i've addressed all technical issues in the updated commit: ### fixes applied 1. **floating npm version** → pinned to exact `@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector@0.8.20` 2. **missing `expectedintegrity`** → added `sha512-vyoouina4hhuo24p3gdnl5yiqmubdknw5swh74ijo3gnfedciw7pcufcqyexojivsj/izxwk6rl9dzt7amhbiq==` (verified via `npm view`) 3. **docslabel mismatch** → changed from `dingtalk-connector` to `dingtalk` ### regarding scope this pr follows the **exact same pattern** as the existing third-party external entries that are already merged in this file: - **wecom** (`@wecom/wecom-openclaw-plugin@2026.5.7` + integrity) — by tencent wecom team - **yuanbao** (`openclaw-plugin-yuanbao`) — by tencent yuanbao team - **weixin** (`@tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.1`) — by tencent weixin team all three are `source: "external"` entries in the same `official-external-channel-catalog.json` file, added via merged prs from external contributors (#72756, #77269, #70562). this dingtalk entry is structurally identical. the dingtalk connector is maintained by the official dingtalk team at [dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-openclaw-connector](https://github.com/dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-openclaw-connector), and i am also a core contributor to dingtalk channel support in openclaw hermes. would appreciate a human maintainer review on the scope question, given the precedent set by wecom/yuanbao/weixin entries. cc @vincentkoc @steipete
commands.freeform_prompt: Thanks for the detailed review. I've addressed all technical issues in the updated commit: ### Fixes Applied 1. **Floating npm version** → Pinned to exact `@dingtalk-real-ai/dingtalk-connector@0.8.20` 2. **Missing `expectedIntegrity`** → Added `sha512-VyOouiNA4HHuO24P3gDNl5YIQmUbdkNw5sWH74IJo3gnfEdciw7pCufCqYeXojIvSj/iZxwk6Rl9dzT7AmHbiQ==` (verified via `npm view`) 3. **docsLabel mismatch** → Changed from `dingtalk-connector` to `dingtalk` ### Regarding scope This PR follows the **exact same pattern** as the existing third-party external entries that are already merged in this file: - **WeCom** (`@wecom/wecom-openclaw-plugin@2026.5.7` + integrity) — by Tencent WeCom team - **Yuanbao** (`openclaw-plugin-yuanbao`) — by Tencent Yuanbao team - **Weixin** (`@tencent-weixin/openclaw-weixin@2.4.1`) — by Tencent Weixin team All three are `source: "external"` entries in the same `official-external-channel-catalog.json` file, added via merged PRs from external contributors (#72756, #77269, #70562). This DingTalk entry is structurally identical. The DingTalk connector is maintained by the official DingTalk team at [DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-openclaw-connector](https://github.com/DingTalk-Real-AI/dingtalk-openclaw-connector), and I am also a core contributor to DingTalk channel support in OpenClaw Hermes. Would appreciate a human maintainer review on the scope question, given the precedent set by WeCom/Yuanbao/Weixin entries. cc @vincentkoc @steipete
